entries.definition:
gh–ṭ–y to become full; to cover, to veil, to hide; to be
overbearing, to become dark. Of this root, only غِطَاء ghiṭāʾ occurs
twice in the Qur’an.

غِطَاء ghiṭāʾ [n.] covering, barrier, veil (50:22) فَكَشَفْنَا عَنْكَ غِطَاءَكَ
فَبَصَرُكَ الْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌ but We have removed from you your covering, so
your sight today is sharp.
